Bar Leone

1

Bar Leone

Hong Kong

  • The World's Best Bar 2025

A tribute to timeless Italian drinking culture in the heart of Hong Kong

Opened in June 2023 by multi award-winning Italian bartender Lorenzo Antinori, Bar Leone's meteoric rise to success can be attributed to two things: a great bar programme and an even greater sense of humour.

Rome-born Antinori comes from serious pedigree in the bar world.

Contact

15 Bridges St, Central, Hong Kong

Visit Bar Leone's Website Instagram
